texto: Aika often says that she is the only one capable of loving me the same way I am is the one capable of loving her, and no one will be able to stand my twisted personality other than her and for me to betray her is unthinkable and impossible
explicacao: Citação de Cullen Thomas sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Aika often says that she is the only one capable of loving me the same way I am is the one capabl…” articula reflexao, sadness, capable em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
